executionArgs.additionalInstruction: This is a Thai-language web app called Project KEY. The UI is in Thai. The app runs on http://localhost:8000. It is a single-page app with 3 pages: My Data (file upload), Collections (organized clusters), and AI Chat. Navigation is via sidebar clicking, not URL routing. No login is required. The app already has 14 files and 5 clusters organized. Delete uses a custom modal (not native confirm). The file input has the 'multiple' attribute for batch uploads.
